lane: operator-directed; public blast radius; fail-closed sushi-k->NAS->VM
doctrine: Deployment standardization is not authority over observations. It only removes deployment drift as an alternative explanation for future witness drift.
method: sushi-k (canary): backup binaries->~/nq/rollback + sqlite .backup DB; cargo build --release (baked HEAD via build.rs); systemctl --user restart; verified.
NAS: staged new binaries via scp (.new); stop services; backup old binaries + DB (consistent, stopped); swap; start; verified. Binaries byte-from-sushi-k (glibc 2.39 match).

VM (public, last): rsync src to HEAD INCLUDING .git (replaced divergent 4ed7c6f fossil) EXCLUDING runs/target/.claude/.governor; confirmed runs/ NOT shipped; on-host cargo build --release (git safe.directory fix from Phase 1 let build.rs bake the commit); backup binaries+DB; stop/swap/start; verified local + public.

verify_each.gate: liveness build_commit == canonical; dashboard HTTP 200; render boundaries present (incident commander / proof checker / cannot testify); leak language zero (P1/neglected/proven correct/192.168.68/dmz.spooky); schema current
verify_each.VM: PASS local (200, boundaries 1/2/5, leaks 0) + PUBLIC https://nq.neutral.zone 200, public leaks 0

build_commit_None_fix: Confirmed end-to-end: VM build_commit None->2077dd2e1e2e. Root cause was git dubious-ownership on /opt/notquery/src (jbeck-owned, root build); Phase-1 safe.directory exception + .git re-sync to a non-fossil HEAD let build.rs bake the real commit.
rollback_artifacts: Each host retains pre-swap binaries (*.pre-2077dd2e1e2e-<stamp>) + pre-swap DB backup. No rollback needed (all green first pass).
still_open_findings: B (MED): public reverse proxy is unmanaged docker caddy:2 (no systemd unit) — reboot-survival unverified. NOT addressed this packet.
D (LOW): VM runs as root, UMask 0022 vs 0002 — standard undecided. NOT addressed.
E (LOW): backup clutter (now +1 pre-swap set per host) — retention rule undecided.
C (MED): VERIFIED BENIGN — 9848 firewalled off-box, no cleartext exposure.
scope_guard: Did NOT start #5 receipt-gate. Did NOT touch caddy / run-as-user / UMask / backup pruning (named, deferred). Only the authorized redeploy executed.
acceptance: Acceptance criterion #1 (same version/commit identity) CLOSED. Packet #4 core DONE. Findings B/D/E remain as named lower-priority follow-ups.
